target: 7th Loop
63. First Steps Are Crucial (1)
Shinpei Ajiro
…This should be fine. At least we're a good distance from Koba Mart. I can't say it's safe, but that's true anywhere on this island.
Shinpei, hurry up and show us your memories! Why did we lose!?
Ajiro-kun, um... what are you talking about...? What do you mean that store is dangerous...!?
That's...
(What should I do? I had her follow me this far, but how much should I explain...)
(I really don't want to involve Koyuba-san.)
(But... it seems Shide and the others know about Koyuba-san.)
(Knowing that, keeping Koyuba-san in the dark might be even more dangerous...)
(But even so, what should I do...)
(What should I do...? What should I do!?)
Shinpei, hurry up!!
Hup!
Eh!? A person... wh-where did she come from...!?
Ushio…
Ushio? Could it be... that hair... Ushio Kofune-san!?
Eh, wait, didn't she pass away!? Wh-What is going on...?
It's been a while, Kaori-chan! I know, you know? You're doing great as an idol now!
Th... Thank you... very much...
An idol?
Eh, you didn't know? Kaori-chan is super famous right now!
I-Is that so?
Sorry, I don't really watch TV or anything...
N-No, more importantly...! Hey, Ajiro-kun, what's going on!? This isn't... a dream, right!?
Ah, sorry for surprising you...
Shinpei, should I try showing Kaori-chan my memories too?
But I can't just drag Koyuba-san into this...
But it seems like Shide knew about Kaori-chan, you know?
Y-Yeah...
(At that time, Shide...)
(He said, "I've been seen by the person I least wanted to be seen by"...)
(What on earth did that mean?)
What are you brooding over, Shinpei Ajiro.
I want to share those memories as soon as possible. They're making their move while we're standing here.
Ushio! Show the memories to just us first. If we stay like this, we might fall behind.
U-Um, Ajiro-kun!
Should I... see those memories, or whatever? If that's better... I'm fine with it.
Eh...
I don't really understand, but... something terrible is happening, right? I can tell just by looking at everyone.
But... are you sure? I think you'll end up seeing some pretty painful scenes.
P-Probably, I'll be fine... If there's even a chance I can be of help, I want you to show me.
See, Kaori-chan gets it!
You're right... Thank you, Koyuba-san. Ushio, do it.
Alright! Then grab my hand! Hizuru-san, Nezu-san too.
Yeah.
Hmph.
Damn it!! Haine is looping too!? What a mess...!!
Just as I thought...
Sensei, is something wrong?
No, it can wait. For now, tend to her.
Th-That just now was... ugh...!
Koyuba-san!
I-I'm fine...! Everything I just saw... was it all real!?
It's the truth. More importantly, Shide said something concerning.
The part about being "seen by the person I least wanted to be seen by"?
Do you have any idea what that could mean?
No, nothing... My agency got a request from the Chamber of Commerce and I just came to help out with the festival...
But at that festival, something like that... ugh!
I don't know the exact intent behind what he said, but... It's definitely dangerous for Koyuba-san to stay on the island until the festival under these circumstances.
Koyuba-san should leave the island right away.
No, that would actually be more dangerous.
Eh…?
This island is already overflowing with Shadows. They might overlook someone who is truly unrelated, but...
There's a high possibility that Kaori Koyuba is already involved in this incident in some way.
Ajiro-kun...
I'll be fine, you know? I-I'm scared, but... I'll do my best.
Hey, Shinpei! Let's have her help us! We need more allies to defeat Haine, right!?
But... Dragging Koyuba-san into this any further is...
We already showed her my memories, so I think she's involved enough, don't you?
I guess that's true, but...
*Sigh*... alright. We'll have you join us, but remember that we're the ones protecting you, okay?
Y-Yeah!
However, regarding the memories you just saw, be careful with your words and actions so the Shadows don't find out.
They shouldn't have recognized Koyuba-san as one of our allies yet.
G-Got it...!
Shinpei! Should we gather other allies besides Kaori-chan and show them my memories too?
Yes, since the enemy is also looping, we don't want to fall behind right from the start.
It would be best to let all the gathered allies relive Ushio's memories and simulate a loop.
Knowing them, they'll probably sniff out our location right away. We have to prepare to intercept them.
You're right. In that case, how about we intercept them at the school?
I agree. A wide campus with narrow hallways... and plenty of blind spots.
We don't know how much fighting force the enemy will mobilize, but it's safe to say it's a perfect place to intercept them.
Then it's decided!! Everyone, let's get ready!!
Um, what about me...?
You should go back to the inn for now.
Isn't it dangerous for her to be alone?
...It's more dangerous if she doesn't return to the inn for a long time. It might draw unwanted attention to her.
Ah, that's true.
Koyuba-san, I don't think I can escort you back, but will you be okay?
Y-Yeah! It's not that far from here, so I'll be fine!
I see. Then I'll contact you later.
Yeah. Ajiro-kun... don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Well then, shall we get going too?
Before that, there's something I need to talk about…
Something you want to talk about?
(...I had Nagumo-sensei and Nezu-san head to the school first.)
(...Then, Ushio and I went home, explained the situation to Mio, and had her "pseudo-loop"...)
64. First Steps Are Crucial (2)
Eh? Wh... what was that just now...!?
...I know it's hard to believe right away, but it's the truth. Please understand, Mio.
Shinpei, I'm sure Mio will be fine! Hurry and call the others!
(Other people I want to bring in as allies...)
(It's probably best to call Sou, Toki-chan, and Totsumura-san and ask them to come to the school.)
(I have to make sure to gather allies who will fight with us! Who should I contact first...?)
"First, let's call Sou"
"I should contact Toki-chan first."
(Right now, Toki-chan is cooperating with the Shadows. To tell her about Haine's betrayal, I absolutely have to call her out and show her Ushio's memories.)
…Yes?
Toki-chan, it's Shinpei. Sorry for the sudden call, what were you doing just now?
Eh... do I have to say? I was in the bath...
Ah!? S-Sorry!! I didn't mean to pry or anything...!
(I ended up asking something weird right off the bat...!)
Um, did something happen?
...Um, I have something important to talk about. Something I need to tell you right away, Toki-chan.
Right, what is it?
I can't really say it over the phone, so could you come to the elementary and middle school gym?
Eh, the school...? At this time?
I can't go into details, but Mio is waiting with me too.
…Mio too…
...Understood. When should I head over?
Thank you. Then, in about 30 minutes!
Yes, see you then.
(Alright! Successfully called out Toki-chan...!!)
(I then contacted Sou and Totsumura-san, and told them I wanted them to come to the school.)
(Sou readily agreed to my request without me explaining anything, and I was able to get a promise from Totsumura-san as well.)
(It looks like the group I expected will be gathered. Now all that's left is...)
Mio…
...I'm sorry, Sis.
Eh?
I'm sorry for calling you a monster. Even though you were fighting so desperately...
Ahhhh, during the summer festival! It's fine, it's fine!
Look, I'm basically a monster anyway!! I don't really mind—
Uwaaaaaah!!!
M-Mio... What's with you, suddenly hugging me...
I-I thought I'd never... see you again!! S... Siiiiiiiiis!!!!
*Hic*! *Sob*!! Uh, uuh, *sniffle*...!!
You don't have to cry that much...
Sis...!! I'll fight too!!
I don't want to just be protected by Shin-chan and you anymore!!
Mio…
...Let's do this!! Let's take them down!!
Yeah!!!
(...I'm glad Mio's recovered.)
I'm hungry!!!
Oh, me too.
…You guys…
Alright, alright. I'll make some sandwiches or something.
Alright!! Curry sandwiches, of course!?
Yeah, I'll make enough for everyone we gathered and Alain too.
(Honestly, being with these guys... is really reassuring!)
My house…!?
Shin-chan, are the curry sandwiches ready?
(It's right when I was making sandwiches, before we all gathered at the school!)
(I'm back... Did I loop? Did I die!? Me...? When!!?)
?? What's wrong? You're spacing out.
Shinpei!!!
Whoa!? You scared me!! What's wrong, Sis...?
Look... at my memories, Mio too!!
I was sniped from outside the window... With a rifle...!!
The bullet that shot through Shinpei wasn't a Shadow, it was real...!! A real rifle bullet!!
Haine found out that Nezu-san was hiding...!!
They killed Nezu-san and took his rifle...!
It was a mistake to have him keep his distance for reconnaissance!!
He ended up outside the range where Ushio could detect his presence... It's my mistake!!
Damn it!! I thought they'd only target me directly...!
(...This feeling...! It's like a cliff is crumbling away...)
Wait! Weren't they aiming to capture Shin-chan alive?
If they kill him, he'll just loop, so why...
Ngh... Haine is looping along with me, so... She realized it...!!
I told you, didn't I...? The starting point of the loop is getting later...
I can see it...
The limit is approaching... The edge of time...
Slowly... but surely... It's crumbling...!!
If I'm killed at the same time like this, I probably—
I can only loop one more time...!!
